content_hints.description: The Yawning Portal is a famous inn and tavern situated in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep, a stone building with a slate roof and several chimneys. Its common room features a 40-foot-diameter open well, which is actually the outer shell of a sunken stone tower descending 140 feet to the first level of Undermountain.
content_hints.read_aloud: You push through the heavy oak doors into a cavernous hall thick with pipe smoke and the din of a hundred conversations. At its center yawns a well shaft forty feet across, its stone rim polished smooth by generations of gripping hands.
event_triggers: On entry: A roar shakes the tavern. Chains snap and a massive troll hauls itself over the rim of the well, dripping with sewer water. Durnan vaults the bar, greatsword in hand. 'EVERYONE BACK!'

content_hints.description: The Yawning Portal is a famous inn and tavern situated in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep, a stone building with a slate roof and several chimneys. Most of the ground floor is taken up by the common room, which features a 40-foot-diameter open well that descends 140 feet to the first level of Undermountain.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see the Yawning Portal, a famous inn and tavern in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep. The stone building has a slate roof and several chimneys, and the ground floor is dominated by the common room, which features a 40-foot-diameter open well that descends 140 feet to the first level of Undermountain.

npcs.name: Lif
npcs.role: The former tavern is haunted by the poltergeist (specter) of the tavern’s previous barkeeper.

content_hints.description: The Yawning Portal is a famous inn and tavern located in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep, a stone building with a slate roof and several chimneys. Its common room features a 40-foot-diameter open well that descends 140 feet to the first level of Undermountain.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see the Yawning Portal, a famous inn and tavern nestled in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep. The stone building has a slate roof and several chimneys, and most of the ground floor is taken up by the common room, which features a 40-foot-diameter open well.
event_triggers: On first visit: Bar fight between Yagra and a Zhentarim thug. A troll climbs out of the well mid-fight.

content_hints.description: The Yawning Portal is a famous inn and tavern located in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep, a stone building with a slate roof and several chimneys. Its common room features a 40-foot-diameter open well that descends 140 feet to the first level of Undermountain.
content_hints.read_aloud: You step into the Yawning Portal, a famous inn and tavern in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep. You see a stone building with a slate roof and several chimneys, and the air is thick with the sounds of adventurers from every corner of the Forgotten Realms.

content_hints.description: The Yawning Portal is a famous inn and tavern located in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep, where adventurers can meet all sorts of colorful characters. The ground floor of the building contains the tavern’s common room, which features a 40-foot-diameter open well that descends 140 feet to the first level of Undermountain.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see the Yawning Portal, a famous inn and tavern in the Castle Ward of Waterdeep, a stone building with a slate roof and several chimneys. The ground floor is dominated by the common room, which features a 40-foot-diameter open well.
content_hints.exit_note: Leads to Undermountain (not part of this module) or back to Waterdeep streets via the front door.
